concepts.finding: Mask R-CNN extends Faster R-CNN by adding a branch for predicting segmentation masks in parallel with bounding box regression, achieving 39.8 AP on COCO and enabling pixel-level instance segmentation.
concepts.implication: Multi-task learning with parallel prediction heads (detection + segmentation) improves both tasks. For search, parallel prediction of intent + entities + reformulation could similarly improve all tasks.
concepts.open_question: Which search tasks benefit most from joint multi-task learning vs. separate models?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A multi-task model jointly predicting query intent, named entities, and reformulation type will outperform separate single-task models on each task by at least 5% F1.
